creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Hi.

I just filed upstream bug report there:
http://code.google.com/p/rawtherapee/issues/detail?id=1294

I also have simple adoption patch for 4.0.7 there:
http://people.freebsd.org/~rm/rawtherapee-4.0.7.diff.txt
but it still fails to build on i386 and builds/runs fine on amd64 (only 
-current was tested).

Hope this helps.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
